response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and valuable entrepreneurial background, his profile leans heavily toward hands-on full-stack development rather than the strategic, Director-level AI expertise required for this role. His recent work touches on AI tooling, but he lacks the recognized industry authority, advanced AI degree, and enterprise customer advisory experience expected of a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy.
strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse tech stacks.
Possesses valuable entrepreneurial experience as the Founder of GISCollective, demonstrating product ownership.
Has recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and working with modern cloud deployments.
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field and recognized, deep expertise in AI/ML strategy.
Career history reflects Senior/Staff-level execution rather than the required Director-level strategic leadership.
Minimal demonstrated experience advising external strategic enterprise partners on cloud and AI adoption.
